## Summary

Implements Phases 2-5 of WAVE canon governance enforcement, making all post-evaluation governance layers auditable and visible in reports:

- **Phase 2**: Gate 15 paired-gate audit (mechanical purity + overcorrection firewall)
- **Phase 3**: Golden Spine / motif ledger (continuity tracking)
- **Phase 4**: Dialogue Canon audit (speaker differentiation, attribution, exposition leakage)
- **Phase 5**: Revision queue canon metadata (risk categories, cross-references)

All layers are **non-blocking**, **fire-and-forget**, **long-form only** (≥25,000 words), and persist as independent artifacts. Short-form manuscripts skip all governance with auditable `skippedBecause` fields.

## Scope

**Touches:**
- New validators: `lib/evaluation/gate15/` (3 files), `lib/evaluation/goldenSpine/`, `lib/evaluation/dialogueCanon/`, `lib/evaluation/revisionCanonMetadata.ts`
- New orchestrator: `lib/evaluation/canonGovernanceRunner.ts` (runs all 4 layers post-WAVE)
- New data layer: `lib/evaluation/waveGovernanceData.ts` (fetches all canon governance artifacts)
- Pipeline hooks: `lib/evaluation/processor.ts` (2 insertion points, non-blocking with 30s timeout)
- Report UI: `components/reports/CanonGovernanceSummary.tsx` (Gate 15 + Golden Spine + Dialogue + Revision Metadata sections)
- Report page: `app/reports/[jobId]/page.tsx` (renders Canon Governance Summary)
- Export routes: `app/api/reports/[jobId]/download/route.ts` (TXT + DOCX exports include all 4 layers)
- Artifact types: `lib/evaluation/artifactPersistence.ts` (4 new types registered)

**Does NOT touch:**
- Core evaluation pipeline (Pass 1/2/3 logic unchanged)
- WAVE executor or wave modules
- Existing evaluation results or scoring
- Short-form evaluation path (skipped with audit trail)

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- All governance layers use `Promise.race` with 30s timeout — if a layer hangs, it times out silently without blocking job completion
- Gate 15 constants (ATTRIBUTION_TAGS, SOFT_TAGS, THOUGHT_VERBS, PHYSIOLOGICAL_FILLERS) are canon-defined and should not be modified without canon approval
- Canon execution order enforced: Gate 15.1 must pass before Gate 15.2 runs (per canon spec)
- Revision canon metadata depends on criteria keys being available in the pipeline — gracefully degrades if missing

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: N/A — this adds new non-blocking post-evaluation layers. Existing pipeline behavior is unchanged; all new code runs after evaluation completion and never fails the job.
